title: Add Modal single-node 8xH100 launcher
author: Muhtasham

data.description: Single-node Modal launcher for running the public Parameter Golf baseline stack on 8xH100 with persistent Modal Volumes and a minimal setup path.
Uses explicit file mounts instead of mounting the full repository.
Persists datasets, tokenizers, Hugging Face cache, and run outputs in dedicated Modal Volumes.
Supports selecting the training script via --script, including train_gpt.py or another explicitly requested script.
Runs distributed training in-process with torch.distributed.run instead of shelling out to torchrun.

novel_contributions: Adds a single-node Modal launcher for the public baseline stack.
Enables 8xH100 runs with persistent Modal Volumes.
Uses explicit file mounts for a minimal setup path.
Allows choosing the training script via --script.
Runs distributed training in-process with torch.distributed.run.
Adds documentation for modal setup, modal run, --skip-dataset, and --extra-env.
